description: Required npm packages for the Privacy Data Rights Activity

routing.comment: Or use react-router-dom if your project uses that instead

installCommands.all_at_once: npm install react react-dom framer-motion lucide-react @google/generative-ai html2canvas class-variance-authority clsx tailwind-merge wouter @radix-ui/react-dialog @radix-ui/react-toast @radix-ui/react-tooltip @radix-ui/react-slot @radix-ui/react-label tailwindcss tailwindcss-animate

by_category.step_1_core: npm install react react-dom framer-motion lucide-react
by_category.step_3_utilities: npm install html2canvas class-variance-authority clsx tailwind-merge
by_category.step_6_styling: npm install -D tailwindcss tailwindcss-animate autoprefixer postcss

peerDependencies.note: These are likely already in your project

notes: Ensure your package.json includes 'type': 'module' if using ES modules
All @radix-ui packages should use compatible versions
If you already have some of these packages, you can skip installing them
Check that versions are compatible with your existing project
The activity uses TypeScript, so ensure typescript is installed as a dev dependency
